content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Thorough review of the failure reconciliation implementation. The new failure_reconciliation.rs (4047 lines) correctly implements retry counting, NeedsOperator escalation after MAX_FAILURE_RETRIES (3), idempotent replay handling, historical state repair, and stale-replay protection. Controller state machine changes (Blocked state now preserves active context, new Blocked→Running and Blocked→Reconciling transitions) are consistent and well-tested. model.rs grouping logic changes for same-run-id retries are correct. fs.rs task_id backfill improvements handle cli-sync placeholder replacement safely. The implementation follows established patterns from success_reconciliation.rs, beads are never closed on failure, structured tracing is present, and 22+ integration tests cover the key scenarios including edge cases. Clippy passes clean with -D warnings. No critical or high severity bugs found.

## Amendments

None.
